name: Workflow canvas orchestration
description: Creates CNCF Serverless Workflow-backed canvas artifacts for n8n-class automation and Higgsfield-style creative pipelines.

capabilities.description: Returns researched n8n, Higgsfield Canvas, and CNCF Serverless Workflow feature targets.
Resolves expression bindings and node-to-node data flow for workflow canvases.
Checks adapter readiness, credential references, and integration setup gaps.
Runs deterministic local workflow replays with bindings, integration traces, and persisted execution history.
Stores workflow canvas artifacts from Serverless Workflow documents.
Exports workflow canvas artifacts back to Serverless Workflow JSON.
Drafts a workflow canvas prompt with n8n and Higgsfield parity targets.
React workbench renderer for workflow canvas artifacts.
Main-pane workflow canvas builder for installed extension workspaces.

renderers.label: Workflow canvas
renderers.description: Renders Agent Harness workflow canvas artifacts.

paneItems.label: Workflow Canvas
paneItems.description: Open saved workflow canvases in the main pane.

assets.description: Workflow canvas extension usage and parity target summary.

permissions.reason: Stores and reads workflow canvas artifacts.
